title: Display Hours on the Monthly Calendar View
excerpt: I would love to be able to view the hours on the monthly view of a calendar. Currently you can only view the hours on the weekly or daily view.

posts.author: lizcrow (Liz Crow)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to be able to view the hours on the monthly view of a calendar. Currently you can only view the hours on the weekly or daily view.
